summary: Phase 3.7h Testing Complete - Operative Portal-Reife features verified. All 20 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Dashboard KPIs, clickable rows, case notes, activities, profile edit, email composer all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/applications/{id}/notes - creates internal case note with author info and audit trail ✓
GET /api/applications/{id}/notes - lists notes for a case (internal for staff, shared for applicants) ✓
GET /api/applications/{id}/activities - returns unified activity stream (activities + audit + email events) ✓
PUT /api/applications/{id}/profile - updates applicant profile fields with audit trail ✓
POST /api/applications/{id}/send-email - sends ad-hoc email from case context with logging ✓
Staff Dashboard: 4 KPI cards (Neue Anfragen, In Bearbeitung, Docs ausstehend, Gesamt) with clickable links ✓
Staff Dashboard: Zuletzt bearbeitet list with clickable rows that navigate to /staff/applications/{id} ✓
Staff Dashboard: Handlungsbedarf sidebar (neue Anfragen, Docs ausstehend counts) ✓
Staff Dashboard: Schnellzugriff links (Kanban, Aufgaben, Nachrichten) ✓
Applicant Detail: Editable personal data fields (Name, E-Mail, Telefon, Land, Geb.-Datum) with hover edit icon ✓
Applicant Detail: Editable application data fields (Kurstyp, Semester, Deutsch, Abschlussland, Kombination, Quelle) ✓
Applicant Detail: Quick Actions bar with Anrufen, E-Mail, WhatsApp buttons (shown when data available) ✓
Applicant Detail: WhatsApp deep-link with pre-filled message opens wa.me in new tab ✓
Applicant Detail: E-Mail composer (subject + body + send) sends via backend and logs event ✓
Applicant Detail: Case Notes section - add internal notes with textarea and send button ✓
Applicant Detail: Activity History showing status changes, profile edits, notes, emails with timestamps ✓
Applicant Detail: Status change buttons working correctly (9 stage buttons) ✓
Applicant Detail: AI Screening panel and Teacher Assignment panel still functional ✓
Login works for all 4 roles: Admin, Staff, Teacher, Applicant ✓
Notification Bell visible in Staff and Applicant layouts ✓
Cookie Banner and Footer Cookie Settings link working ✓
No [OFFEN]/[HINWEIS] staging warnings on any page ✓
seed_data_creation: 4 accounts seeded via seed.py, test application 69c8b7f98fed65b8d953ffb0 used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3.7h complete. All operative portal features working: Dashboard KPIs, clickable rows, case notes CRUD, activity history, profile edit, email composer, WhatsApp deep-link. Quick Actions (call, mailto, whatsapp) only show when applicant has corresponding data. Some test applications don't have linked users so personal data shows '–'. Kanban board has 74 cards. All 4 role logins verified. Cookie management working.
passed_checks: Backend: Admin login returns superadmin role
Backend: Staff login returns staff role
Backend: Teacher login returns teacher role
Backend: Applicant login returns applicant role
Backend: Profile edit endpoint responds correctly
Frontend: Staff Dashboard loads with data-testid='staff-dashboard'
Frontend: 4 KPI cards visible (stat-new-leads, stat-in-review, stat-pending-docs, stat-total)
Frontend: Recent applications rows visible (8 rows)
Frontend: Notification bell visible in Staff layout
Frontend: Applicant Detail Page loads with data-testid='applicant-detail-page'
Frontend: Back to Kanban link visible
Frontend: Personal data fields visible (field-full_name, field-email, field-phone, field-country)
Frontend: Application data fields visible (field-course_type, field-language_level)
Frontend: Case Notes section visible with input and submit button
Frontend: Edit button appears on hover for editable fields
Frontend: Email composer opens with subject, body, send button
Frontend: All 4 role logins redirect correctly
Frontend: Cookie banner appears on first visit
Frontend: Footer Cookie Settings link visible
Frontend: Cookie Manage Panel opens from footer link
Frontend: Kanban board loads with 74 cards
